label: Xenotype count
description: A starting pawn count entry that specifies a xenotype. Used in ScenPart_ConfigPage_ConfigureStartingPawns_Xenotypes to define how many pawns of each xenotype are generated.

xenotype.label: Xenotype
xenotype.description: XenotypeDef used when generating pawns for this entry.

allowedDevelopmentalStages.label: Allowed developmental stages
allowedDevelopmentalStages.description: Developmental stages allowed for pawns generated from this entry. Defaults to Baby, Child, and Adult.

description.label: Description
description.description: Optional custom label for this xenotype count entry, used in the UI instead of the xenotype label. Translated.
